name: R53 — Stock Research Agent (Telegram → Claude Code → Verdict)

nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes: Listens for all messages. Next node filters for $TICKER pattern.

nodes.name: Extract Ticker
nodes.notes: Extracts $TICKER from Telegram message. Returns empty array (stops workflow) if no ticker found.

parameters.text:
=🔍 **Research started for ${{ $json.ticker }}**

Pulling SEC filings, analyzing financials, scanning news...
This takes 2-5 minutes. Verdict incoming.

nodes.name: Send Acknowledgment
nodes.notes: Immediately acknowledges the request so user knows it's being processed.

nodes.name: SSH → Claude Code
nodes.notes:
SSHes to the machine running Claude Code CLI. Runs the stock-first-pass skill with the ticker. The --print flag makes it non-interactive. Output is JSON. Timeout: 10 minutes.

CONFIGURATION NEEDED:
- Replace /path/to/n8n-robonuggets-templates with actual repo path
- SSH credentials must have access to the Claude Code machine
- Claude Code CLI must be installed and authenticated on that machine
- Increase SSH timeout to 600s (10 min) in n8n settings

nodes.name: Parse Claude Output
nodes.notes: Parses the JSON output from Claude Code. Handles edge cases where Claude outputs extra text before/after the JSON.

nodes.name: Success?
nodes.notes: Routes based on whether Claude Code returned a successful result.

nodes.name: Format Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Formats the research output into a Telegram-friendly message under 4096 chars.

nodes.name: Send Verdict
nodes.notes: Posts the research verdict back to the Telegram chat.

nodes.name: Deep Dive?
nodes.notes: Checks if verdict is DEEP_DIVE or if deep_dive_needed flag is true.

parameters.text:
=🔵 **DEEP DIVE ALERT: ${{ $json.ticker }}**

{{ $json.thesis }}

Verdict: {{ $json.verdict }} ({{ $json.confidence }})

Full report + model saved. Review when ready.

_Triggered by {{ $json.fromUser }}_

nodes.name: DM Ethan (Deep Dive)
nodes.notes:
DMs Ethan directly when a DEEP_DIVE verdict is triggered.

CONFIGURATION: Replace ETHAN_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with Ethan's actual Telegram chat ID.

nodes.name: Send Error
nodes.notes: Sends error message back to Telegram if research fails.
